title: Alain
content:
{{Top|leg|notoc=1}} {{Youmay|the species|[[Alain (Human)|the Rebel trooper]]}} {{Species |image= |name=Alain |designation=[[Sentience/Legends|Sentient]]{{CSWECite|I|17|Alain}}. |class= |subspecies= |races= |height= |length= |wingspan= |mass= |skincolor= |haircolor= |feathers= |eyecolor= |distinctions= |lifespan= |origin=[[Von-Alai]] |habitat= |diet= |language= }} {{Quote|What a terrible destiny. The Alains have lost their planet.''"
"''Beings choose their own fate. They could have fought for their planet, but their indifference and their greed made them passive. There was no war here, my young apprentice. Merely beings who did not choose to fight the power that ruled them.|Qui-Gon Jinn and Dooku|''[[Legacy of the Jedi]]''}} The '''Alain''' were native to [[Von-Alai]]. Due to the heavy pollution of their [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]], they built their residential buildings on giant platforms above the toxic sludge. ==Behind the scenes== It is uncertain if the Alain were [[Human/Legends|Humans]] or a native species. ==Appearances== *''[[Legacy of the Jedi]]'' {{1stm}} ==Sources== *''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |de=Alainer }} [[Category:Undefined social groups]]
